meta.question: From which external documents are the TMT requirements imported?
meta.finalAnswer: The TMT requirements are imported from DOORS (Dynamic Object Oriented Requirements System). This is evidenced by the organization of the requirements within the model, where they are grouped under packages and paths explicitly named "TMT Requirements imported from DOORS" (e.g., TMT::Project::Work Packages::Project Systems Engineering::01 Components::Operational::TMT Observatory System::Black Box Specification::TMT Requirements imported from DOORS).

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("requirement")))
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: I have identified several requirement-related elements. Now I need to map their properties to see if any of them have a relationship indicating an external document source (e.g., via 'supplier' or 'client' in a dependency, or a specific 'source' property). I will pick one of the 'TMT Requirement' related elements to explore.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name "TMT Requirement Customization" .
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
}
GROUP BY ?prop
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?name WHERE {
  ?elem rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: The query results clearly show that TMT requirements are organized in packages with names like 'TMT Requirements imported from DOORS'. The structure of the URIs and the names of the requirement elements themselves indicate that the external document source is DOORS. Specifically, the requirements are grouped under paths containing 'TMT Requirements imported from DOORS', which directly answers the user's question.

request.answer: The TMT requirements are imported from DOORS (Dynamic Object Oriented Requirements System). This is evidenced by the organization of the requirements within the model, where they are grouped under packages and paths explicitly named "TMT Requirements imported from DOORS" (e.g., TMT::Project::Work Packages::Project Systems Engineering::01 Components::Operational::TMT Observatory System::Black Box Specification::TMT Requirements imported from DOORS).
